case_title: RENT A CENTER VS GORDON, MATTHEW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, MATTHEW
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.00 FILED BY RENT A CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT A CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORDON, MATTHEW $2,342.64 PRINCIPAL, $106.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,448.64, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RECEIVE THE JUDGMENT FROM DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO ALSO RECEIVE THE FURNITURE FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
